description: Product Description Snuggly Hood The plush fleece lined hood is an excellent way to keep your baby's head warm. Secure Tie Belt All our children's dressing gowns feature secure sewn on waist tie belt for safety and making it impossible to lose! Convenient Front Pockets The two patch pockets will provide the space for small toys and treats. Cosy Plush Fleece Made from 100% Polyester Plush Fleece Lounging never looked so fun Let's have fun with our novelty pink and blue teddy bear soft fleece dressing gowns! Snuggle up your baby in our novelty robes These baby boys and girls animal hooded dressing gowns feature a relaxed fit, which provide the warm snug comfort.
